project.name: Sample Project State Layer POC
project.one_liner: Portable, evidence-backed project state artifact + MCP server for agent-native coordination.
project.current_goal: Prove the concept end-to-end: state artifact + MCP server + exec status queries with evidence.
non_goals: Host or mirror code as a primary function

constraints.privacy: No secrets in state artifact; AccessRefs are pointers only.
constraints.latency: Exec queries should answer from state quickly; deep drill-down via evidence links.

project.tech_stack_summary: Local-first state artifact (YAML/JSONL) + MCP server exposing tools; optional hosted hub later.

typed_links.label: Core repo (code lives here)
typed_links.notes: State layer links out; code is not stored in the state artifact.

typed_links.label: Research notebook (NotebookLM)
typed_links.notes: Linked research; decisions/attempts live in this state artifact.

environments.name: Development
environments.deployment_notes: Run MCP server locally; state artifact lives on disk.

request_access_steps: Request access from platform-team via internal ticket.
Ensure you have SSO role "psl-read" for read-only, or "psl-admin" for overrides.
access_refs.security_notes: Do not store credentials here; store pointers only.

request_access_steps: Ask platform-team to grant Vault read to this path.
Verify access by reading the secret name only (do not paste key into state).
Role required to approve decisions and break stale claims.

WI_93090d72ab89.blocker_note: Need agreement on false-positive tolerance before implementing.

WI_2c9113931a14.title: Implement exec.query (Q1–Q10) with evidence-first responses
WI_2c9113931a14.intent: Enable leaders to ask status questions in chat and receive concise evidence-backed answers.

Each response includes confidence + evidence refs

Each response includes confidence + evidence refs

attempts.hypothesis: An MCP tool surface with claim/lease will prevent duplicate agent work without needing Git-style merges.
attempts.action_taken: Implemented claim/lease semantics in the tool contract and prototype server stub.
attempts.result: Able to reject non-claimant updates deterministically; append-only logs remained merge-safe.
attempts.conclusion: Claim/lease + optimistic concurrency is sufficient for POC coordination.
attempts.next_step: Implement idempotency by record ID for append-only tools.

attempts.hypothesis: Simple prefix matching will catch most accidental secret pastes without too many false positives.
attempts.action_taken: Drafted rules for common prefixes (AKIA, ghp_, xoxb-, PEM markers).
attempts.result: Catches obvious secrets; unclear on false positives for high-entropy random IDs.
attempts.conclusion: Balanced approach needed: prefix patterns + allowlist fields + optional entropy check.
attempts.next_step: Decide false-positive tolerance and add a documented override workflow.

decisions.title: Use append-only logs + optimistic concurrency (avoid Git-style merges)
decisions.context: We need collaboration without full file merge complexity; most churny info is attempts/decisions/timeline.
decisions.impacts: Design favors JSONL append-only logs and tool-mediated mutations.

decisions.title: Agents may propose decisions; humans approve by default
decisions.context: We want agent velocity without letting agents silently change strategic direction.

timeline.summary: POC kickoff: state artifact + MCP surface defined
timeline.details: Created initial schema, invariants, exec query contract, and MCP tool contract.
Avoid Git-style merges; use append-only logs and optimistic concurrency.

timeline.summary: Blocker: Secret detection false-positive tolerance not decided
timeline.details: Need to decide how aggressive to be before implementing SECRET_DETECTED rules.
